description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MacOS Builds that runs on pushes to and pull requests affecting specific files. Use a macos-10.15 job with a matrix strategy to test different C++ compilers and build configurations. For each job, check out the repository, install Ninja, and then install LLVM if using Clang. Configure the build environment, run CMake to configure the build, build the test suite, and run the tests.
